content:
Revolutionizing Cellular Health: Niagen™ IV and Injections Expand Nationwide

The landscape of wellness and longevity medicine is undergoing a seismic shift with the announcement that Niagen Bioscience’s pharmaceutical-grade Niagen™ IV and injections are now available at over 50 iCRYO clinics and more than 900 total clinics nationwide. This massive expansion marks a pivotal moment in the accessibility of advanced cellular health solutions, bringing cutting-edge science directly to local communities. For individuals seeking to optimize their energy levels, support healthy aging, and enhance overall vitality, this widespread availability represents a new era of convenience and efficacy.

Niagen, known scientifically as nicotinamide riboside, has been the subject of extensive research regarding its ability to boost NAD+ levels in the body. NAD+ (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide) is a critical coenzyme found in every living cell, essential for converting nutrients into energy and repairing DNA. As we age, our natural NAD+ levels decline, leading to decreased energy and increased susceptibility to age-related health issues. The introduction of pharmaceutical-grade Niagen™ in an intravenous and injectable format offers a potent solution to this biological challenge, bypassing the digestive system for maximum absorption and immediate cellular impact.

The Strategic Partnership with iCRYO and Nationwide Clinics

The collaboration between Niagen Bioscience and iCRYO is a strategic masterstroke in the wellness industry. iCRYO, renowned for its state-of-the-art cryotherapy and recovery services, provides the perfect environment for administering high-level nutritional therapies. By integrating Niagen™ IV and injections into their service menu, these clinics are offering a holistic approach to recovery and rejuvenation. The fact that this offering has scaled to over 50 iCRYO locations demonstrates a robust demand and a proven track record of success.

Beyond the iCRYO network, the availability of these treatments in more than 900 clinics nationwide signifies a broad democratization of premium health technology. Whether located in bustling metropolitan centers or growing suburban hubs, these clinics are now equipped to provide patients with direct access to pharmaceutical-grade NAD+ precursors. This geographic diversity ensures that high-quality longevity treatments are no longer confined to specialized research institutions or exclusive medical spas but are becoming a standard part of proactive healthcare across the country.

Understanding the Power of Pharmaceutical-Grade Niagen™

Not all supplements are created equal, and the distinction of being pharmaceutical-grade is paramount when discussing intravenous and injectable therapies. Niagen Bioscience adheres to the most rigorous manufacturing standards, ensuring that every vial of Niagen™ used in these clinics is pure, potent, and free from contaminants. This level of quality control is essential for treatments that enter the bloodstream directly, where safety and consistency are non-negotiable.

The active ingredient, nicotinamide riboside, is unique because it is a highly efficient precursor to NAD+. Unlike other forms of Vitamin B3, such as niacin or nicotinamide, nicotinamide riboside has been shown to effectively raise NAD+ levels without the adverse side effects often associated with high-dose niacin, such as flushing. By utilizing a pharmaceutical-grade formulation, Niagen Bioscience guarantees that the molecule remains stable and bioavailable, delivering the intended therapeutic benefits with every administration.

The Science of NAD+ and Cellular Energy

To understand the hype surrounding this nationwide rollout, one must understand the biology of NAD+. This coenzyme is a key player in mitochondrial function, the powerhouses of our cells. Mitochondria rely on NAD+ to facilitate the electron transport chain, the process by which our bodies convert food into ATP (adenosine triphosphate), the primary energy currency of the cell. When NAD+ levels are high, cellular energy production is optimized, leading to improved physical stamina, mental clarity, and metabolic efficiency.
